title: Ceramic Glue 35g,Instant Ceramic Super Glue for Porcelain and Pottery Repair,Super Adhesive for Porcelain, Pottery, Dishes, Tiles, DIY Crafts, and More
features: 💸Super Performance: This transparent ceramic adhesive is specially formulated for repairing broken ceramics, porcelain, and pottery. This super adhesive provides the perfect solution for ceramics. Utilizing advanced chemical technology, it permanently bonds to ceramic materials, delivering invisible, super durable, and seamless repairs. It restores ceramics, porcelain, and handicrafts to be stable and beautiful.

⏱️Asciugatura Lampo: This 35g high-performance ceramic glue provides the perfect adhesive solution for all your ceramic bonding needs! With an impressive drying time of just 15 seconds, you can finish your projects in no time! This super terracotta glue delivers exceptional results on ceramics, dishes, tiles, sanitaryware, ornaments, garden ceramics, jewelry making, DIY crafts, and beyond.

✅Safe and Eco-friendly: Our exclusive formula for ceramic glue has passed multiple safety reports like MSDS, SGS, and is 100% safe to use. Unlike other ceramic glues in the market, ours is transparent, odorless, and eco-friendly - a safe and non-toxic option for all your crafting needs.

⚛️Easy Application:The nozzle design of this ceramic repair super glue allows for precise application to bonding areas. Featuring a fine-point applicator, the porcelain glue enables quicker and easier distribution in hard-to-reach spots. This simple pottery adhesive will make your repair projects effortless!

🔒SAFETY NOTICE: Keep out of children's reach. Use this glue only for general repairs and crafts. Unsuitable for valuable or irreplaceable items. Test on a small area first. You assume responsibility for verifying suitability and compatibility. We are not liable for damages from misuse or chemical reactions. By using this glue, you agree to these terms. If unsatisfied, a full refund is available.
description: How to use the ceramic glue? 1. Clean and dry the surface to be bonded. 2. Apply a small amount of ceramic adhesive on a surface. 3. Press the two surfaces together for 10-45 seconds to achieve bonding.
